projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Highly complex technical systems and scalable architectures developed by our studio.

Aura.name: Aura Scheduler Sim
Aura.description: Advanced operating systems simulator focused on real-time task management, prioritization, and dispatching. Developed with dynamic graphical rendering to analyze the behavior and performance of a real Scheduler.

NexusStore.name: NexusStore & Pixel Bank Ecosystem
NexusStore.description: Distributed ecosystem built under a microservices architecture. It simulates the full workflow of an e-commerce platform connected to an independent banking gateway, implementing OAuth2/JWT authentication, secure API communication, and relational data persistence.
